overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a misty forest environment. The character traverses grassy terrain, passes through dense woodland, walks under a large twisted natural archway, and emerges into an open area with distant mountains visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy forest clearing with rocky hillside

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through open grassland with two swords on his back, rocky hillside to the right

entered.detail: grass-covered rocky slope with scattered boulders on the right side of the path
dense coniferous trees forming the distant forest edge
open grassland with patches of taller vegetation and wild grass

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through an open grassy clearing bordered by a rocky hillside on the right and distant pine forests ahead. The terrain is uneven with scattered boulders and patches of tall grass under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense coniferous forest with thick canopy cover

events.description: moving from open grassland into denser forest area with thicker tree cover and dimmer lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing through denser woodland navigating around trees and undergrowth

entered.detail: thick overhead cover of pine branches blocking most of the sky
leafless twisted branches and dry shrubs in the undergrowth
dense bushes and ferns lining the forest path

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a denser forest environment with thick canopy cover blocking the sky. Dead branches and thick undergrowth line the narrow dirt path as Geralt walks deeper into the woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path approaching large twisted natural archway

events.description: large twisted natural archway formed by tree roots comes into view in the distance ahead
character passes underneath the massive twisted archway structure

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking under the large natural archway while navigating the forest path

entered.detail: massive natural arch formed by gnarled tree roots and twisted trunks spanning the path
decayed tree trunk lying across the mossy forest floor

segments.scene_description: A massive twisted archway formed by gnarled tree roots becomes visible ahead. Geralt approaches and passes underneath the natural structure, moving from the dense forest into a more open area beyond the arch.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest meadow with mountain vista

events.description: forest opens up to reveal distant snow-capped mountains on the horizon

agents.ego_description: walking through open grassland with mountain views visible ahead

entered.detail: distant mountain peak with snow visible on the summit emerging from the mist
cluster of bright red flowers growing in the grass beside the path
expansive grassy meadow with scattered trees and clear visibility

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the archway, the forest opens into a wide grassy meadow with distant snow-capped mountains visible through the haze. Red wildflowers dot the landscape on the right as Geralt continues walking through the open terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt traverses a rugged landscape that shifts from an open clearing into a dense forest before emerging into a vast mountain vista. It begins in an uneven grassy clearing bordered by a rocky hillside and distant pine forests under an overcast sky. As the camera follows Geralt deeper, the environment transitions into a thick woodland where a dense canopy blocks the light and dead branches line a narrow dirt path. The scene then focuses on a massive twisted archway of gnarled roots, which Geralt passes under to leave the oppressive forest behind. Finally, the terrain opens into a wide grassy meadow dotted with red wildflowers, revealing snow-capped mountains through a distant haze.
